description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a rich brown finish, extending into a long, slender barrel made of dark metal. A telescopic scope is mounted on top, indicating its use for precision shooting at distance. The trigger guard and magazine area are constructed from metal, with the magazine appearing to be internal and flush with the stock. The bolt-action mechanism is visible, suggesting a manually operated firing system. The muzzle is simple, with no visible attachments, and the overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military or hunting rifles. The rifle is accompanied by a single cartridge, shown separately in some views.
description: A long, bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, mounted scope, and a simple metal barrel, evoking a classic military or hunting firearm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end and the alignment of the scope above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, mounted scope, and a single cartridge beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's width and the scope's position, with the bolt and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's length, stock, scope, and cartridge on the other side.
